title: Your Opinion Needed: New WordDocs App Features

posts.author: banana (Ian H)
posts.cookedHtml:
Are you having trouble with WordDocs?

I’m here to ask for your opinion on Word Docs. I’m working on an app to add features to Word Docs to make it better for you.

  • Enhanced editing capabilities: quickly update words to lower or uppercase
  • Find and replace words in multiple docs
  • Import docs from MS-Word and Google Docs

Is this something you’re interested in?
Would you be willing to pay to have these features?
Would you like to have any other features added?

posts.author: danielball (Daniel Ball)
posts.cookedHtml: I wanted an answer to this question, so I built something that does just that. See Word Import - monday.com Marketplace
